error_summary: fe280cdf (Doctor Fix) and e48616bc (Smoke Test) have 15 and 8 consecutive Telegram delivery errors respectively. Config shows correct chatId (5387843769) but errors persist after prior sweep's claimed fix.
root_cause: Why 1: Delivery errors despite correct config → Why 2: Jobs use agentId='main' in sessionTarget=isolated — delivery may need different format for main-agent isolated jobs → Why 3: Prior sweep said fix applied 12:48Z but errors continue → Why 4: Cron delivery for these jobs may need channel:telegram format vs to field → Why 5: Root config mismatch between old and new delivery schema.
fix_applied: Escalated to Eric. Both jobs' delivery config shows to:5387843769 and mode:announce but 15/8 consecutive errors indicate the fix on 2026-03-24T12:48Z did not resolve the issue. Recommend Eric review and manually run these jobs to confirm.
prevention: Add delivery config validation test in smoke test. Monitor should verify consecutive errors drop to 0 after any config fix before marking resolved.

error_summary: remediation-step-03 (Containerize & Deploy Railway) still stalled at 25% — now >25h with no progress. Steps 04-07 remain queued. Observability pipeline blocked.

fix_applied: Escalated again in sweep report. GPU idle on PowerSpec (0%) — resources available. No API PATCH endpoint to push task forward. Eric must direct Coder to resume containerization.
prevention: Add task-stall auto-escalation to Conductor with auto-spawn of Coder when running task >2h no progress.

error_summary: fe280cdf (Doctor Fix) 15 consecutive delivery errors, e48616bc (Smoke Test) 8 consecutive delivery errors. Both agentId=main jobs failing Telegram delivery despite correct to/channel config.

error_summary: remediation-step-03 (Containerize & Deploy Railway) stuck at 25% — Docker command not found on PowerSpec (Windows machine). ETA was 2026-03-23T16:00Z, now 22h overdue.
root_cause: Why 1: Task stuck at 25% despite 'Starting Docker containerization' update at 13:37Z → Why 2: SSH to PowerSpec returns Windows error for ~/ProjectRemoteCoder — Docker Desktop not installed or not running → Why 3: PowerSpec is a Windows machine; Railway/Docker deployment was designed assuming Linux → Why 4: No validation of Docker availability before assigning task to PowerSpec → Why 5: Task assumed Docker is installed; it is not.
fix_applied: Logged. Escalating to Eric — Docker Desktop needs to be installed on PowerSpec (Windows) before this step can proceed. GPU idle at 0%, resources available but Docker is the blocker.

error_summary: RESOLVED: fe280cdf (Doctor Fix, 15 errors) and e48616bc (Smoke Test, 8 errors) had Telegram delivery failures — missing agentId=monitor; agentId was set to main causing delivery resolution to fail in isolated sessions.
root_cause: Why 1: Delivering to Telegram requires target <chatId> → Why 2: Jobs had agentId=main but ran in isolated sessions → Why 3: Delivery resolver could not find chatId from 'to' field for main-agent isolated sessions → Why 4: Jobs were created before monitor agentId was added → Why 5: No validation that agentId matches delivery target for isolated sessions.
fix_applied: Updated both jobs agentId to 'monitor'. Delivery config already had correct channel:telegram and to:5387843769. Fix should clear consecutive errors on next run at 5:00 AM and 5:30 AM tomorrow.
prevention: New cron jobs for monitor-agent tasks must use agentId=monitor. Added to SKILL.md pattern: always set agentId=monitor for monitor-run jobs.

error_summary: RESOLVED: Docker 29.2.1 confirmed available on PowerSpec (Windows). Prior incident log was incorrect — Docker Desktop IS installed and running. remediation-step-03 stall is NOT due to Docker. Actual blocker: no active Coder agent driving the task.
root_cause: Why 1: Task at 25% for >25h → Why 2: Coder agent was spawned but completed initial step without continuing → Why 3: No automated task progression or handoff → Why 4: Monitor can alert but cannot spawn Coder → Why 5: Need Conductor to assign Coder agent to continue.
fix_applied: Docker availability confirmed. Task update logged. Escalating to Eric to direct Coder agent to continue remediation-step-03 (Railway deployment).
prevention: Add automated Coder spawn trigger when running task stalls >2h. Conductor should re-queue Coder automatically.

error_summary: Reports generated with empty content — 3 silent failures in pipeline (env truncation, nested dict, parser fallback)
root_cause: 1) Docker Compose .env inline comments truncate API keys. 2) Synthesis dict nested under wrong key instead of merged at top level. 3) Shared JSON parser returns tagger-shaped fallback when synthesis fails, silently replacing real data. Systemic: no output quality validation, no integration tests, silent fallbacks everywhere.
fix_applied: Fixed .env comments, merge synthesis at top level, recover from _rawResponse on parse error
prevention: Need: env validation on startup, Anthropic structured outputs, synthesis field validation, content quality gate, E2E smoke test. See memory/rca-financial-report-app.md

error_summary: Reports marked done with empty content — 14 bugs across 8 files
root_cause: Pipeline optimized for completion not correctness: silent fallbacks, shared parser wrong schema, .env truncation, no output validation, no quality gates, no retry, no tests
fix_applied: Structured outputs, 3 blocking quality gates, retry with backoff, env validation, crawler HTML parsing, SHA256 integrity, 33 unit tests
prevention: 5 standing rules added: correctness-first, output parity, RCA core, autonomous execution, dual-model planning. All encoded in PIPELINE.md, DELEGATION.md, INCIDENTS.md, agent SKILL files
